hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} said: "Whoever combs their beard 
seventy times and counts it one by one will not be approached by Shaytan (Satan) for 
forty days."  
[AL SADUQ] 
Additionally, there is no harm in using combs made of ivory, kohl applicators, and 
ointment containers. 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 489 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 128 • Al -Ādāb al-Dīniyyah, 
Part 1, p. 66 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 70 • Security, Part 1, p. 37 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 669 • Wasa’il Al-
Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 126 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 117 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 321

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim {a.s} said:  
"Comb your hair with combs made of ivory, for it removes ailments."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 129 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 70 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, 
vol. 2, p. 123 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 117

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 322
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٢٢

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
324   -  وَّق َّال إ َّن ُّو إَّلْحَّسَّن ِ مُّوسَّى ن ْن ُّ ج َّعْق َّزٍ  عَّ « :ي َّذَّعْهُّن  َّ ج َّز  ُّ إَّلس  َّعْزِ وَّ ي َّس ْمِي زُّ إَّلي  َّوْب ِ وَّ ن ِكَّاح 
إَّلْأ ِمَّاءِ .
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} said: "Combing the hair removes 
ailments," referring specifically to fever. In a narration by Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah al -
Barqi, it is stated: 'It removes fatigue,' meaning weakness.  
Allah {SWT}, the Exalted, said:  
'And do not slacken in My remembrance,' (Surah Taha 20:42) meaning do not become 
weak. 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 129 • Mustadrak Al-Wasail, Part 1, p. 409 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 323

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Abu al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim {a.s} said:  
"There are three things which, if a person understands them, they will not abandon: 
trimming the hair, shortening the garment, and marrying bondwomen."  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 484 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 129 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 647 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 104 • Wasa’il Al-Shia, vol. 5, p. 38 • Wasa’il Al-Shia, vol. 20, p. 256 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 324

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٢٤

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said to some of his companions:  
"Cut your hair short to reduce its dirt, pests, and grime; it will strengthen your neck, 
improve your eyesight, and provide relief for your body."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 325

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٢٥

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: "Whoever grows their hair should take good 
care of it or cut it short." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 485 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 129 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, 
vol. 1, p. 70 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 651 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 129 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 83 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 326

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٢٦

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
328 - وَّق َّال إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ :  « . 
كان  س عز رسول إلله صلى إلله علي ه وإ له وق زة  لم ي ن لغ  إلق زق
hadiths.en:
He {a.s} said: "Beautiful hair is part of Allah’s {SWT} provision, so honor it." 
[REFERENCES] Da‘ā’im al-Islām, Part 1, p. 125 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 129 • Al-Ash'athiyat, 
Part 1, p. 156 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, vol. 1, p. 70 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 651 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 129 • 
Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 83 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 116 • Mustadrak Al-Wasail, Part 1, p. 412 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 327

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said:  
"Whoever grows their hair and does not part it, Allah {SWT} will part it with a saw of fire." 
[AL SADUQ] 
The hair of the Messenger of Allah {saws} was shoulder-length but did not reach (enough) 
to part.  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 129 • Awaali al-La’aali, Part 2, p. 20 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 328

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٢٨

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: "Trim your mustaches and let your beards 
grow, and do not resemble the Jews." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Wasa’il Al-Shia, vol. 2, p. 116

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 329
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٢٩

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
331  - وَّق َّال رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ : «
وَّ ن ُّعْق ِى  إَّللِّحَّى وَّ هِى َّ إَّلْق ِطْزَّة .
hadiths.en:
"The Messenger of Allah {saws} once saw (looked) a man with a long beard, and 
said: "It would have been better if he had trimmed his beard.  
When the man heard this, he trimmed his beard to a moderate length. Then entered to 
see the Prophet. When the Prophet saw him, He {saws} said: "This is how you should do 
it. " 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1  
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 330

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٠

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: "The Magians (Zoroastrians) trim their beards 
and let their mustaches grow long, but we trim the mustaches and let the beards grow, 
and this is the natural disposition (fitrah)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 657 • Wasa’il Al-Shia, vol. 2, p. 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 331

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣١

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: "Whatever extends beyond a fist-
length of the beard is in the Fire." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 486 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 655 
• Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 113 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 113 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 332

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٢

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Muhammad ibn Muslim said: "I saw Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir {a.s} while 
the barber was trimming his beard, and Imam {a.s} said: 'Shape it evenly.'  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 487 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, 
vol. 1, p. 68 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 656 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’a, vol. 2, p. 110 • Bihar Al Anwar, Vol. 46, p. 299 • Awalim 
al-Ulum, Vol. 19, p. 235

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 333
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.location: Volume 1 › THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٣

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
335  -  وَّق َّال رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ  صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ :  «
إَّلذ  َّوَّإن ِث ِ س َّح َّاعَّه   وَّ ق ِى  إَّلْق َّق َّا س ُّو ْم .
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: "Hold your beard with your hand 
(in a fist) and trim what is excess." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • The Makarem al -Akhlaq, Part 1, p. 68 • Bihar Al-
Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 113 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 334
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٤

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
336  -  وَّق َّال إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ :  «
ن َّي ْص َّاءَّ ق َّق َّالَّ ي َّا ج َّن ْزَّن ِي لُّ مَّا هَّذ َّإ ق َّق َّالَّ هَّذ َّإ وَّق َّار  ق َّق َّالَّ إ ِن ْزَّإهِي مُّ إَّلل َّهُّم َّ ر ِذْن ِى  وَّق َّارإً .
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said:  
"Gray hair at the front of the head is a sign of blessing, at the temples is a sign of 
generosity, at the hair ends is a sign of courage, and at the nape of the neck is a sign of 
ill-omen."  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 493 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Al -Khisal, Part 1, p. 
235 • Uyūn al-Akhbār, Part 1, p. 275 • Al-Waezin, volume 2, page 474 • The Makarem al-Akhlaq, Part 1, p. 68 
• Kashf al -Ghummah, Part 2, p. 293 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 663 • Bihar Al -Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 106 • Bihar Al -
Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 107 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 335

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٥

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: "The first person to have gray hair 
was Ibrahim {a.s}, the Friend (Khaleel) of Allah {SWT}. When he saw a white strand in his 
beard, He {a.s} said: 'O’ Archangel Jibril {a.s}, what is this?'  
Archangel Jibril {a.s} said: "'This is dignity (Waqar).'  
So Ibrahim {a.s} replied: 'O’ Allah {SWT}, increase me in dignity.' 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 644 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 336
reference.chapter: THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٦

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "Whoever grows a gray hair in Islam, it will be a light for them on 
the Day of Judgment." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 644

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 337

reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ٢٢، ح ٣٣٧

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar: ق الن هى  عن  ن ي ف  إلس ي ث  ن هى  كزإهي ه  لأ ن هى  ي حزي م لأن
hadiths.en:
The Messenger of Allah {saws} said: "Gray hair is light, so do not pluck it." 
[REFERENCES] Da‘ā’im al-Islām, Part 1, p. 125 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 130 • Al-Ash'athiyat, 
Part 1, p. 156 • The Makarem al-Akhlaq, Part 1, p. 68 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 644 • Wasail Al-Shia, Part 2, p. 130 
• Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 107 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
339 -  « .

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 338

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.ar:
340 - إَّلص َّاذِق َّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ي َّق ُّول .  
ق ا ج ن ارهم علي هم إلسلام لأ ي ح ي لف  ق ى  جاله  وإجذة  لأن  مح زج ها من  عن ذ إلله ي عالى ذ كزة، وإ ن ما ي ح ي لف  ن حسث  إج ي لاف   
إلأ جوإل.
hadiths.en:
"It is reported that Imam Ali {a.s} saw no harm in cutting gray hair but disliked 
plucking it." 
[AL SADUQ] 
The prohibition against plucking grey hair is a dislike rather than a strict prohibition, 
because: (continues in next hadith) 
[REFERENCES] Da‘ā’im al-Islām, Part 1, p. 125 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 131 • Al-Ash'athiyat, 
Part 1, p. 156 • Mustadrak Al-Wasail, Part 1, p. 412 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 339

hadiths.chapter: 22. THE RITUAL BATH OF JUMU’AH, ENTERING THE BATHHOUSE, ITS ETIQUETTE, AND TEACHINGS ON
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} says: "There is no harm in cutting gray 
hair or plucking it, but cutting it is more beloved to me than plucking it."  
[AL SADUQ] 
Their (Imams ) hadiths do not differ in one case to another because it comes from Allah 
{SWT}, the Exalted; rather, it differs according to the variation of circumstances  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Volume 6, p. 492 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 1, p. 131 • The Makarem al -
Akhlaq, Part 1, p. 69 • Al-Wafi, Vol. 6, p. 644 • Wasail Al-Shia, Part 2, p. 130 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol. 73, p. 107

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 1, Ch. 22, H. 340
